items.name: OV-1 Armor
items.description: With the advancements of armor materials and technologies, ACRD has developed a universal armor system which is partially powered, fully compatible with a multitude of protection packages, and fully customizable with external hardpoints. A flexible, durable, and long lasting armor, the OV-1 system has been the first major export from the ACRD department, and such has been heavily modified to suit practically any situation.
